name: osfi_read_document
description: Read a targeted chunk from a specific OSFI guideline document. Never returns the full document — always targeted by chapter, keyword, or char_offset. Use osfi_search_guidance first to identify char_offset for precise reads.

chapter.description: Partial heading text to locate chapter

keyword.description: Returns chunk around first keyword match

max_chars.description: Max chars to return. Default from config (8000).
